description_long: This object consists of three distinct knives or short swords, each featuring a curved, single-edged blade with a pronounced point. The blades are metallic, with a dark, possibly oxidized finish and several cutouts or holes along the spine, giving them a modern or fantasy-inspired appearance. The handles are ergonomically shaped, likely made of metal or composite material, and have a gold or brass coloration with some visible texturing for grip. One of the knives appears to have a partial hand guard, while the others have minimal or no guard. The overall design is sleek and aggressive, suggesting these are specialized or decorative blades rather than standard kitchen knives. The set is visually striking, with a combination of functional and ornamental elements.
description: A set of three curved, single-edged knives with dark metallic blades featuring cutouts and gold-toned ergonomic handles, blending modern and ornamental design.
description_view_0: Three knives are shown from an angled perspective, highlighting the curvature of the blades and the ergonomic, gold-toned handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the blades and handles, emphasizing the blade's thinness and the handle's textured grip.
description_view_2: Top-down view showing the blade cutouts and the overall width and shape of the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, focusing on the smooth, metallic finish of the handles and the sharpness of the blade edges.
attribute_blade_type: curved, single-edged, pointed, with decorative cutouts
attribute_handle_design: ergonomic, gold-toned, textured grip, slightly contoured
